edges.evidence_quote: The Buffalo family is purported to hold strong connections with the Hamilton-based Luppino and Papalia families.
edges.context: The text states the Buffalo family has strong connections with the Luppino family.

edges.evidence_quote: The Buffalo family is purported to hold strong connections with the Hamilton-based Luppino and Papalia families.

edges.evidence_quote: Magaddino's strongest ally on the Commission was his nephew Joseph Bonanno; the two Mafia bosses were from the same Sicilian town of Castellammare del Golfo.
edges.context: Stefano Magaddino of Buffalo was a strong ally of Joseph Bonanno on the Commission.

edges.evidence_quote: In late 1996, the Buffalo family, along with the Los Angeles crime family, joined forces to take over a loan sharking and auto insurance fraud racket in Las Vegas controlled by Herbert Blitzstein, a Chicago Outfit associate.
edges.context: Buffalo and Los Angeles families cooperated to take over Blitzstein's Las Vegas rackets.

edges.evidence_quote: In late 1996, the Buffalo family, along with the Los Angeles crime family, joined forces to take over a loan sharking and auto insurance fraud racket in Las Vegas controlled by Herbert Blitzstein, a Chicago Outfit associate.
edges.context: Buffalo family targeted a Chicago Outfit associate's racket, indicating conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: According to Murdock, the Musitano brothers had been fed up with being a satellite (crew) of the Buffalo family and having to pay tribute money to the family.
edges.context: Musitano crew rebelled against Buffalo family, leading to murders of Papalia and Barillaro.

edges.evidence_quote: Also revealed by Murdock was that Pat Musitano had discussed with Quebec Mafia boss Vito Rizzuto and Gaetano Panepinto about Rizzuto investing in Ontario.
edges.context: Rizzuto family discussed investments with Musitano, who were in conflict with Buffalo family.

edges.evidence_quote: According to CISC intelligence, the new, yet unidentified, Buffalo boss had a strong relationship with outlaw bikers, unlike his predecessor Johny Papalia, who refused to work with them.
edges.context: Buffalo family allied with Hells Angels after Papalia's death.

edges.evidence_quote: The US Department of Justice said that Canadian law enforcement authorities had arrested various members and associates of the Bonanno, Gambino, and Todaro crime families on charges that include narcotics trafficking.
edges.context: Members of the Buffalo (Todaro) and Bonanno families were arrested together for narcotics trafficking, indicating cooperation.

edges.context: Members of the Buffalo (Todaro) and Gambino families were arrested together for narcotics trafficking, indicating cooperation.

edges.evidence_quote: the Buffalo/Todaro Crime family is strong enough to call the shots in the recent mob war between the Musitano and other crime families in the Hamilton underworld.
edges.context: The Buffalo crime family exerts influence over the Musitano family in the Hamilton mob war.

edges.evidence_quote: Violi was to 'assume control over the operations of the Luppino-Violi crime family and solidify his power base with further and greater collaboration with the New York-based Mafia families.'
edges.context: The Buffalo crime family's underboss was to control the Luppino-Violi crime family, indicating a structural tie.

edges.evidence_quote: the current mob war in Southern Ontario has its roots in the mob conflict that had Paolo Violi and his brothers Francesco & Rocco murdered in Montreal during the late 1970s by the Rizzuto crime family.
edges.context: The Violi family was in conflict with the Rizzuto family, leading to murders.

edges.evidence_quote: The investigation revealed that New York City mobsters arranged with the Los Angeles family, boss Tommy Gambino, to induct Iavarone into the Los Angeles family in 2017.
